title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory
description: A visual breakdown of the core components that define an algebraic group, showing the relationship between the set, operation, and required axioms.
relationships: A Set (G) is combined with a Binary Operation (∘)
The operation must satisfy Closure for all elements in G
The operation must be Associative for all elements in G
The set must contain an Identity Element (e) for the operation
Every element must have an Inverse Element within G
